_comment: Declarative manifest for the check-upstream-versions skill. Each entry is one upstream artifact we pin. To track a new chart/image, add a component here -- the engine (scripts/check_versions.py) needs no changes. See reference.md for the field spec and the version-scheme gotchas.

components.title: Hermes Agent (app image)
components.version_scheme: calver vYYYY.M.D (GitHub also tags the same release as SemVer v0.x)
components.notes: Chart defaults appVersion to "latest" (floating); image.tag falls back to appVersion. Pin a vYYYY.M.D tag (or digest) for production.

components.title: OpenClaw (app image)
components.version_scheme: calver YYYY.M.D (image tags have NO leading v; GitHub release tags DO)
components.notes: Consumed by the operator via spec.image. Usually a low-risk bump for the chart (same CRD/operator).

components.title: OpenClaw operator (Helm subchart)
components.version_scheme: semver (chart version, independent of the operator appVersion)
components.notes: Authoritative 'latest' = newest chart tag in the OCI registry (what `helm dependency update` pulls). Watch for a possible move to ghcr.io/openclaw-rocks/charts and update repo here if upstream migrates. After a bump run `helm dependency update charts/openclaw-instance` to refresh Chart.lock, and re-vendor crd-schema/ if the CRD changed.
